data.title: Setting Up an NGO That Donors Actually Trust
data.excerpt: Registration, a constitution, a governance framework and a donor-readiness pack — in the right order.

content.html:
Registering and running a compliant business in Tanzania touches BRELA, the TRA, sector regulators and your local council, and each of them keeps its own clock. This guide walks through the paperwork in the order the authorities actually expect it, flags the fees that change without much notice, and points out the deadlines that quietly trigger penalties if you miss them. okau

  • Reserve your name before you print anything

  • Budget for fees that change without notice

  • Diarise every statutory deadline the day you register okau

Before you start

Registering and running a compliant business in Tanzania touches BRELA, the TRA, sector regulators and your local council, and each of them keeps its own clock. This guide walks through the paperwork in the order the authorities actually expect it, flags the fees that change without much notice, and points out the deadlines that quietly trigger penalties if you miss them.
